creator: IZ-FreeBSD0902-nospam@hs-karlsruhe.de
text:
A Logitech QuickCam Pro 9000 gives a product identication code
  which is not listed in src/sys/dev/usb/usbdevs,v 1.328.2.23.

How-To-Repeat: Plug in the the device. Search in /usr/src/sys/dev/usb/usbdevs
  after it.
  ugen0: <vendor 0x046d product 0x0990, class 239/2, rev 2.00/0.05, addr 2> on uhub0
